brand.name: Dimple Beauty Salon
brand.description: Luxury ladies beauty salon in Navi Mumbai. Sophisticated, Vogue-aesthetic, deep emerald and gold.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter for headings. Headings must have tracking-tight. Overlines must have generous tracking.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous whitespace, asymmetric layouts, editorial grid (bento variations), architectural digest feel.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid hairline gold or emerald borders for cards and sections. Cardless style preferred.
layout_and_spacing.grid_modes: Use 'MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID' for Services and Gallery.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80) or solid cream, English/Hindi toggle
components.buttons: Square or rounded-none edges. Primary uses Deep Emerald bg with Gold text, hover state slightly lighter emerald. Include data-testid.
components.cards: Cardless or 1px delicate gold border with no shadow, minimal padding, image heavy.
components.whatsapp_widget: Fixed bottom-right, distinct green color but adapted to brand tone or standard WhatsApp green, hover pulse animation.
components.language_toggle: Visible EN / हिंदी text toggle in navbar.

motion.hover: Smooth color transitions, slight image scale on hover (transition: transform 0.5s ease-out).
motion.scroll: Fade in up for sections using Framer Motion (staggered children).

hero.description: Modern luxury spa room to establish premium location feel

about.description: Elegant woman beauty portrait for empowerment and lifestyle aesthetic

sections: Header: Logo, Nav links (Home, Services, Gallery, About, Contact), Lang Toggle (EN / हिंदी), CTA (Call Now)
Hero: Asymmetric layout. Full width or split 50/50 with Deep Emerald block and Cream text. Headline: High-end salon branding.
About/Intro: Brief story, women-owned, LGBTQ+ friendly. Social proof (4.6★, 258 reviews).
Services: Editorial bento grid with Hair, Skin, Nails, Makeup categories.
Gallery Grid: Curated photo layout for actual salon photos (using placeholder stock for now).
Testimonials: Real quotes from Ashwini, Pallavi, Aisha.
Contact: Address (Giriraj Darshan, Sector 9 Kopar Khairane Rd), Map embed, Hours (open till 9pm), phone (098678 73647), Instagram link.
Footer: Elegant dark background (Deep Emerald) with gold/cream text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Cormorant Garamond and DM Sans from Google Fonts.
Use custom HTML/Tailwind for layouts over strict Shadcn components to ensure editorial freedom (bento grids, overlaps).
Implement language toggle state managing English and Hindi text variants across the site.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case).
Hero image needs an overlay opacity: `bg-black/30` or `bg-white/20`, do not over-darken the image.
Include a sticky WhatsApp button in the bottom right corner with click-to-chat link.
Use Framer Motion for scroll reveal animations on major sections.
